must_know_anatomy: 3 fascia layers: superficial investing (platysma/EJV), pretracheal (continuous with carotid sheath, superior/inf thyroid vessels), prevertebral (thick, lines prevert muscles, sympa
Landmarks: angle of mandible ~C2-3, carotid tubercle C6.
Risks: RLN (~2.3%, right more variable/vulnerable); sympathetic chain on longus colli lateral at C6 (Horner if injured); carotid sheath; retropharyngeal hematoma.

night_before_review_checklist: Weight-bearing: procedure-specific; confirm in attending preference and fixation/implant stability for Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF).
DVT prophylaxis: per institutional protocol unless contraindicated.
Activity restrictions: protect surgical repair; avoid premature loading or range of motion beyond protocol.
Watch for: wound complications, neurovascular change, increasing pain, fever, or loss of function.
Follow-up: routine wound check and early mobilization per service protocol.
